name: novel-inakb
description: Novel InaKB — 小说·伊纳知识库，本地优先的小说创作与世界观管理工具
author: ly-ina

scripts.electron:build: tsc && vite build && tsc -p electron/tsconfig.json && node -e "var f=require('fs');f.renameSync('dist-electron/main.js','dist-electron/main.cjs');f.renameSync('dist-electron/preload.js','dist-electron/preload.cjs')" && electron-builder --dir
scripts.electron:build:win: tsc && vite build && tsc -p electron/tsconfig.json && node -e "var f=require('fs');f.renameSync('dist-electron/main.js','dist-electron/main.cjs');f.renameSync('dist-electron/preload.js','dist-electron/preload.cjs')" && electron-builder --win --dir
scripts.electron:build:mac: tsc && vite build && tsc -p electron/tsconfig.json && node -e "var f=require('fs');f.renameSync('dist-electron/main.js','dist-electron/main.cjs');f.renameSync('dist-electron/preload.js','dist-electron/preload.cjs')" && electron-builder --mac --dir
scripts.electron:build:linux: tsc && vite build && tsc -p electron/tsconfig.json && node -e "var f=require('fs');f.renameSync('dist-electron/main.js','dist-electron/main.cjs');f.renameSync('dist-electron/preload.js','dist-electron/preload.cjs')" && electron-builder --linux --dir
scripts.electron:build:all: tsc && vite build && tsc -p electron/tsconfig.json && node -e "var f=require('fs');f.renameSync('dist-electron/main.js','dist-electron/main.cjs');f.renameSync('dist-electron/preload.js','dist-electron/preload.cjs')" && electron-builder --win --mac --linux --dir
scripts.android:sync: vite build && npx cap sync android
scripts.android:build: vite build && npx cap sync android && cd android && gradlew assembleDebug
